final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (short-video vertical cover) for GGU brand, gaming monitor product launch.

Style/medium: flat graphic design with minimalist premium aesthetic, sharp typography, dark high-tech feel
Composition: rule-of-thirds layout — large bold headline anchored at upper third, product visual centered at middle third, tagline at lower third; vertical 9:16 frame
Subject: gaming monitor with ultra-thin bezel, screen glowing with vivid accurate colors, positioned as hero product
Scene/backdrop: deep black or near-black background with subtle dark gradient, no busy environment
Lighting/mood: cool blue and white accent lighting on monitor edges, clean and premium, low ambient glow suggesting precision technology
Color palette: deep black as base, electric blue or white as primary accent, minimal secondary color to highlight key specs
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as the dominant headline in large bold type; "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as subtitle below
Constraints: headline must be the largest visual element — eye-catching at thumbnail scale; text must be legible at small sizes; layout must respect rule-of-thirds grid
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, gradients that obscure text, generic gaming RGB rainbow overload, watermark, stuffer aesthetic
